description: The @nonnull annotation overrides a nullable column to become non-nullable in the output

columns.name: bio
columns.note: forced non-nullable via @nonnull annotation despite allowing NULL in schema

name: force_nonnull
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserForceNonnullBio
-- @returns :one
-- @nonnull bio
SELECT id, bio FROM users WHERE id = $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
